steps.t: Nona is in her cave in the High Knolls, and is waiting for you to return with the dried herb bundles you collected.
Nona has asked you to throw the dried herb bundles you collected into the cooking fire in the cave chamber with the dying man. She hopes it will impro…
The smoke of the burning herbs has slightly revived the most injured of Nona's survivors.
You have found the man you came into Wildermore to find, and should now tell your companions.
Gléowine is in Nona's cave, and wishes to speak with you.
